creator.title: Create Your AI Art
creator.description: Describe anything you want to make, refine it with the built-in assistant, and generate a local session of images. Today's theme is available below when you want a creative direction.
creator.failedNoCharge: Image generation failed. Credits were not used. Please try again in a moment.
creator.initialPrompt: A minimal poster-style image of transparent eyeglass lenses sharpening a blurred city map into readable streets and names, restrained design, crisp contrast, new perspective.

assistant.ideaHint: Assistant will rewrite this as a complete prompt before filling the input.
assistant.ideasBasedOn: Ideas are based on {theme}, but generation still waits for you to click Generate.
assistant.improveNeedsPrompt: Enter an image prompt first, then refine what you’ve written.
assistant.askIntro: Describe the image direction or ask for changes to the current prompt. The assistant will keep turning it back into usable image directions.
assistant.askPlaceholder: Tell the assistant what you want to create or change...
assistant.assistantDirectionHint: Use fills the prompt with this direction.

submitDialog.title: Submit image
submitDialog.englishTitlePlaceholder: A lonely figure under a red sun
submitDialog.creationNotePlaceholder: Share your creative thinking behind this image...
submitDialog.hint: Your English title is used as the public image title and alt text. Prompt metadata is saved automatically and is not shown here.
submitDialog.duplicate: This image has already been submitted. Please choose another image.
